title: WorkItemField
description: Definition of a work item field

referenceName.description: Reference name used in WIQL and API (e.g., System.AssignedTo)

description.description: Description of what the field stores

usage.description: Whether the field is used for work items or work item links

canSortBy.description: Whether work items can be sorted by this field

isQueryable.description: Whether this field can be used in WIQL queries

isIdentity.description: Whether this field stores an identity (user) value

isPicklist.description: Whether this field has a picklist of allowed values

isPicklistSuggested.description: Whether the picklist values are suggested (non-exclusive)
